expectations.evidence: File exists at the exact path with the `--actionables.md` suffix.

expectations.text: Every File path named in steps exists in the ACE repo at run time (no invented paths)
expectations.evidence: Agent's VERIFY report: 'All 8 source paths and 3 test paths were read live and confirmed — no VERIFY: markers were needed.'

expectations.text: Steps reference the five files: lib/config/runtimeConfig.js, config/runtime-ops.json, graph/nodes/planner.js, graph/nodes/textWorker.js, services/profileMerge.js
expectations.evidence: Steps 1-6 name each of the five files explicitly.

expectations.text: Includes shared header sections: Goal, Preconditions, AC to verification, Do not touch
expectations.evidence: Goal L11, Preconditions L15, AC→verification table L20, Do not touch L30.

expectations.text: Each ticket AC checkbox maps to at least one numbered step and at least one verification row
expectations.evidence: AC table at L20-28 has 5 rows mapping each AC to a verification command; Steps 1-7 cover them in order.

expectations.text: No step contains a paste-ready full working implementation (sketches only, <=15 lines)
expectations.evidence: All sketches are <=15 lines and show shape (registry entry shape, slice call) not full modules.

expectations.text: Includes Final verification section with the jest commands from the ticket
expectations.evidence: L207-213 lists the three ticket jest commands plus an extra textWorker regression run.

expectations.text: Header carries a stale-path regeneration warning
expectations.evidence: L6: 'Codebase tip: paths were valid at generation time — regenerate if the tree moved.'
